response.justification: Strong, broad software engineering background with 15+ years across web, mobile, desktop, and embedded, plus genuine open-source and Linux depth (founder of the open-source GISCollective platform, comfortable with Docker/Kubernetes/CI-CD). Technical fit for architecture and full-stack work is high. However, the role is an executive-level leadership position requiring German at C1 minimum, and the candidate lists only Basic German — a hard gap against a stated requirement. Demonstrated formal team-leadership/people-management at the Head-of-Development level is also thin (mostly senior IC roles with mentoring and community teaching rather than operational leadership of a team). UML and explicit requirements-management experience are not evidenced. Worth a conversation to probe leadership scope and language trajectory, but not a clear yes.
strengths: Extensive, versatile development experience and strong open-source/Linux background
Founded and architected an open-source, event-driven Geo-Data platform (architecture + ownership)
Proven knowledge-sharing/mentoring through multi-day courses, workshops, and conference talks
concerns: German only 'Basic' vs required C1 minimum — a hard role requirement
Limited evidence of executive/operational team-leadership at Head-of-Dev level
No explicit UML, requirements management, or IT security/compliance experience
